members.name: AddTranslation
members.summary: Adds a translation to the main translation domain.

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Removes all translations from the main translation domain.

members.name: CompareLocales
members.signature: public int CompareLocales(String localeA, String localeB)
members.summary: Compares two locales and returns a similarity score between [code]0[/code] (no match) and [code]10[/code] (full match).

members.name: FindTranslations
members.signature: public Translation[] FindTranslations(String locale, bool exact)
members.summary: Returns the [Translation] instances in the main translation domain that match [param locale] (see [method compare_locales]). If [param exact] is [code]true[/code], only instances whose locale exactly equals [param locale] will be returned.

members.name: FormatNumber
members.signature: public String FormatNumber(String number, String locale)
members.summary: Converts a number from Western Arabic (0..9) to the numeral system used in the given [param locale].

members.name: GetAllCountries
members.summary: Returns an array of known country codes.

members.name: GetAllLanguages
members.summary: Returns array of known language codes.

members.name: GetAllScripts
members.summary: Returns an array of known script codes.

members.name: GetCountryName
members.summary: Returns a readable country name for the [param country] code.

members.name: GetLanguageName
members.summary: Returns a readable language name for the [param language] code.

members.name: GetLoadedLocales
members.summary: Returns an array of all loaded locales of the project.

members.name: GetLocale
members.summary: Returns the current locale of the project. See also [method OS.get_locale] and [method OS.get_locale_language] to query the locale of the user system.

members.name: GetLocaleName
members.summary: Returns a locale's language and its variant (e.g. [code]"en_US"[/code] would return [code]"English (United States)"[/code]).

members.name: GetOrAddDomain
members.summary: Returns the translation domain with the specified name. An empty translation domain will be created and added if it does not exist.

members.name: GetPercentSign
members.summary: Returns the percent sign used in the given [param locale].

members.name: GetPluralRules
members.summary: Returns the default plural rules for the [param locale].

members.name: GetScriptName
members.summary: Returns a readable script name for the [param script] code.

members.name: GetToolLocale
members.summary: Returns the current locale of the editor. [b]Note:[/b] When called from an exported project returns the same value as [method get_locale].

members.name: GetTranslationObject
members.summary: Returns the [Translation] instance that best matches [param locale] in the main translation domain. Returns [code]null[/code] if there are no matches.

members.name: GetTranslations
members.summary: Returns all available [Translation] instances in the main translation domain as added by [method add_translation].

members.name: HasDomain
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if a translation domain with the specified name exists.

members.name: HasTranslation
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the main translation domain contains the given [param translation].

members.name: HasTranslationForLocale
members.signature: public bool HasTranslationForLocale(String locale, bool exact)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if there are any [Translation] instances in the main translation domain that match [param locale] (see [method compare_locales]). If [param exact] is [code]true[/code], only instances whose locale exactly equals [param locale] are considered.

members.name: ParseNumber
members.signature: public String ParseNumber(String number, String locale)
members.summary: Converts [param number] from the numeral system used in the given [param locale] to Western Arabic (0..9).

members.name: Pseudolocalize
members.summary: Returns the pseudolocalized string based on the [param message] passed in. [b]Note:[/b] This method always uses the main translation domain.

members.name: ReloadPseudolocalization
members.summary: Reparses the pseudolocalization options and reloads the translation for the main translation domain.

members.name: RemoveDomain
members.summary: Removes the translation domain with the specified name. [b]Note:[/b] Trying to remove the main translation domain is an error.

members.name: RemoveTranslation
members.summary: Removes the given translation from the main translation domain.

members.name: SetLocale
members.summary: Sets the locale of the project. The [param locale] string will be standardized to match known locales (e.g. [code]en-US[/code] would be matched to [code]en_US[/code]). If translations have been loaded beforehand for the new locale, they will be applied.

members.name: StandardizeLocale
members.signature: public String StandardizeLocale(String locale, bool addDefaults)
members.summary: Returns a [param locale] string standardized to match known locales (e.g. [code]en-US[/code] would be matched to [code]en_US[/code]). If [param add_defaults] is [code]true[/code], the locale may have a default script or country added.

members.name: Translate
members.signature: public StringName Translate(StringName message, StringName context)
members.summary: Returns the current locale's translation for the given message and context. [b]Note:[/b] This method always uses the main translation domain.

members.name: TranslatePlural
members.signature: public StringName TranslatePlural(StringName message, StringName pluralMessage, int n, StringName context)
members.summary: Returns the current locale's translation for the given message, plural message and context. The number [param n] is the number or quantity of the plural object. It will be used to guide the translation system to fetch the correct plural form for the selected language. [b]Note:[/b] This method always uses the main translation domain.

members.name: PseudolocalizationEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], enables the use of pseudolocalization on the main translation domain. See [member ProjectSettings.internationalization/pseudolocalization/use_pseudolocalization] for details.
